title: Quick Search shows origin suggestions after typing a partial query
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open quick-search and see autocomplete suggestions after typing a partial origin query.

steps.description: Type "par" into the origin IATA input
Verify the origin suggestions dropdown is visible and contains airport suggestion items

title: Quick Search selects an origin suggestion with the mouse
description: Verifies that clicking a visible origin suggestion fills the origin field with an IATA code and closes the suggestions list.

steps.description: Navigate to /quick-search and wait until the auth guard has finished and input[name="origin_iata"] is visible
Type "par" into input[name="origin_iata"] and wait for #origin-suggestions to become visible
Click the first visible button inside #origin-suggestions
Verify input[name="origin_iata"] now contains a 3-letter IATA code and #origin-suggestions is no longer visible

title: Quick Search supports keyboard selection in origin autocomplete
description: Verifies that ArrowDown and Enter can select an origin suggestion from the autocomplete list.

steps.description: Type "par" into the origin IATA input
Press ArrowDown and then press Enter while the origin suggestions dropdown is visible
Verify the origin field contains a selected 3-letter IATA code after keyboard selection

title: Quick Search hides suggestions when the origin input is cleared
description: Verifies that clearing the origin input removes the visible suggestions dropdown.

steps.description: Navigate to /quick-search and wait until the auth guard has finished and input[name="origin_iata"] is visible
Type "par" into input[name="origin_iata"] and wait for #origin-suggestions to become visible

title: Quick Search blocks empty route submission with validation feedback
description: Verifies that submitting quick-search without origin and destination shows a visible validation error and stays on the quick-search page.

steps.description: Navigate to /quick-search and wait until the auth guard has finished and both route inputs are visible
Clear input[name="origin_iata"] and input[name="destination_iata"] if they contain any values
Press Enter from input[name="origin_iata"] to submit the empty route state

Verify a visible validation message mentions that a search is required, the route inputs remain on /quick-search, and at least one visible validation element uses current quick-search selectors instead of XPath

title: Quick Search accepts a valid route and outbound date without inline validation errors
description: Verifies that after selecting valid origin and destination values and an outbound date, the search can be submitted without inline validation errors.

steps.description: Type "par" into the origin IATA input and select the first visible suggestion
Type "dub" into the destination IATA input and select the first visible suggestion if suggestions appear
Open the outbound date picker, choose the first enabled future date, and close the date picker
Verify the quick-search page does not show inline field validation errors for origin, destination, or outbound date after submission
